# Dun-Rite Seamless Gutters, Inc.

> Mississippi's seamless gutter specialist since 1996. Serving 14 cities across the greater Jackson metro area with seamless installation, copper specialty, gutter guards, cleaning, repair, commercial work, and custom downspouts. Mississippi licensed corporation, fully insured, with a 25-year manufacturer warranty on materials and 2-year labor warranty on every installation.

## Services

- [Seamless Gutter Installation](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/seamless-gutter-installation/): Custom-formed on-site in 5-inch and 6-inch K-style profiles. .032 gauge aluminum standard.
- [Aluminum Gutters](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/aluminum-gutters/): Lightweight, rust-proof, available in 25+ baked-enamel colors. 20–30 year service life.
- [Copper Gutters](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/copper-gutters/): Hand-soldered seams, decorative profiles, standing-seam accents. Signature specialty since 1996. 50+ year service life.
- [Gutter Guards & Leaf Protection](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/gutter-guards/): Mesh, screen, and foam systems. Compatible with new or existing gutters.
- [Gutter Cleaning](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/gutter-cleaning/): Twice-yearly maintenance plans. Spring + fall scheduled cleanings with written inspection reports.
- [Gutter Repair & Replacement](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/gutter-repair-replacement/): Same-day estimates. Storm damage specialists. Insurance claim documentation provided.
- [Commercial Gutters](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/commercial-gutters/): Office, retail, multi-family, industrial. Builder partnerships and AIA-formatted billing.
- [Custom Downspouts](https://dunrite-gutters.com/services/custom-downspouts/): Round, square, oversized 3x4 and 4x5 profiles. Underground drainage tie-ins available.

## Service Areas

- [All 14 Mississippi cities](https://dunrite-gutters.com/service-areas/): Madison (HQ), Jackson, Brandon, Flowood, Ridgeland, Clinton, Canton, Pearl, Gluckstadt, Florence, Richland, Bolton, Terry, Raymond.

## Company

- [About / Owner Story](https://dunrite-gutters.com/about/): Mark Dungan, founder since 1996. 30 years installing gutters across central Mississippi.
- [Contact](https://dunrite-gutters.com/contact/): Free estimates with no travel fees within service area. Same-day callbacks during business hours.
- [FAQ](https://dunrite-gutters.com/faq/): Common questions about pricing, materials, process, and service areas.

## Contact

- Phone: (601) 750-1800
- Email: mark.dungan@yahoo.com
- Address: 115 Cherrybrook Dr, Madison, MS 39110
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8 AM – 5 PM (Sat–Sun closed)

## Differentiators

- Established 1996 (~30 years experience)
- 25-year manufacturer warranty on materials
- 2-year labor warranty on every installation
- Workers' Compensation + General Liability insurance
- Mississippi licensed corporation
- Hand-soldered copper specialty (signature work)
- 14-city service radius from Madison HQ — no travel fees within service area
